Name: Black Box
Details: A top secret SLDF project, the 'Black Box' was a compact device that allowed for faster than light communication using the same Kearny-Fuchida principles behind hyperpulse generators, but for a fraction of their size and cost and only allowing for the transmission of limited text messages. With the development of HPG technology, which allowed for bigger amounts of data to be transmitted, the Black Boxes became obsolete and the project was shelved by the Star League, because of technical interference between both systems.
